info.title: ListingJet API
info.description: AI-powered real estate listing media automation. Upload property photos, get MLS bundles, branded flyers, AI descriptions, social content, video tours, and 3D floorplans.

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

Logout endpoint. Client should discard tokens.

Note: Full server-side token revocation requires a Redis-backed
blocklist. For now, short-lived access tokens (1hr) limit exposure.
Sign in or register with a Google ID token from the Sign In With Google flow.

get.description: List recent invoices from Stripe.

post.description: Upgrade or downgrade subscription plan.

schema.title: Response List Permissions Listings  Listing Id  Permissions Get

get.description: Get the audit trail for a listing. Requires at least read access.

schema.title: Response Get Listing Audit Log Listings  Listing Id  Audit Log Get

post.description:
Create a new listing. Deducts one credit for credit-billed tenants (402 if insufficient).

For legacy tenants, enforces the monthly listing quota for the current plan.

get.description:
List listings with optional filters and pagination.

- **state**: filter by listing state (e.g. "approved", "delivered")
- **search**: search in address fields (street, city)
- **page**: page number (default 1)
- **page_size**: items per page (default 50, max 200)
Return a single listing by ID. Returns 404 if not found or not owned by the current tenant.

patch.description: Update a listing's address or metadata fields. Only provided fields are changed.

get.description: Return the 3-D dollhouse scene JSON generated from the listing's floorplan asset.

post.description: Generate presigned S3 upload URLs for browser-direct uploads.

Register uploaded S3 assets for a listing and trigger the AI pipeline.

Advances the listing from NEW → UPLOADING and automatically starts the
Temporal workflow. Returns 403 if the plan's per-listing asset quota is exceeded.

get.description: List all assets associated with a listing, ordered by upload time.

schema.title: Response List Assets Listings  Listing Id  Assets Get

get.description: Return the AI-selected photo package for the listing, ordered by position.

post.description: Reorder photos in a package. Body: {"swaps": [{"from_position": 0, "to_position": 3}]}.
Transition a listing from AWAITING_REVIEW to IN_REVIEW, locking it for editing.
Approve a listing that is IN_REVIEW, signalling the workflow to continue post-approval steps.
Reject a listing with a reason code. Transitions state to FAILED.
Reset a failed listing and re-trigger the pipeline.
Cancel a listing and refund credits if using credit billing.

get.description: Return per-step pipeline progress for a listing.

post.description: Register a user-submitted or professional video.
Run photo compliance scan on a listing's packaged photos. Returns per-photo report.

get.description: Get the event audit trail for a listing, newest first.

post.description: Start importing photos from a third-party delivery link (Google Drive, Show & Tour).

get.description: Check the status of a link-import job.
Unauthenticated health check for the admin router.
Authenticated health check that confirms admin role access.
List all tenants ordered by creation date. Requires superadmin role.

schema.title: Response List Tenants Admin Tenants Get

get.description: Return detailed info for a single tenant including user and listing counts. Requires superadmin.

patch.description: Update a tenant's name, plan, or webhook URL. Changes are audit-logged. Requires superadmin.

post.description: Send a test event to the tenant's webhook URL.

get.description: List all users belonging to a tenant. Requires superadmin.

schema.title: Response List Users Admin Tenants  Tenant Id  Users Get

post.description: Create a new user under the given tenant. Returns 409 if email is already registered. Requires superadmin.

patch.description: Change a user's role (e.g. viewer → admin). Requires superadmin.

get.description: Return platform-wide counts: tenants, users, listings, and listings grouped by state. Requires superadmin.
Credit balance + recent transactions for a tenant.

post.description: Manually add or remove credits for a tenant with audit trail.

get.description: Platform-wide credit statistics.
Revenue breakdown — subscriptions vs credit purchases.
List all listings across tenants with filters.

schema.title: Response Admin List Listings Admin Listings Get

patch.description: Update a listing's address, metadata, or state (for fixing errors).

post.description: Admin retry of a failed/timed-out listing (cross-tenant).

get.description: List all users across tenants with filters.

schema.title: Response Admin List All Users Admin Users Get

get.description: Paginated audit log viewer.

schema.title: Response Admin Audit Log Admin Audit Log Get

get.description: Recent system events for health monitoring.

schema.title: Response Admin Recent Events Admin Events Recent Get

post.description: Create a demo listing with uploaded photos. No auth required. Rate limited: 3/IP/day.

get.description: View a demo listing. No auth required. Returns 410 if expired.

post.description: Claim a demo listing. Requires auth (tenant_id from middleware).

get.description: Return the current tenant's name, plan, and webhook URL configuration.

patch.description: Update tenant settings such as the outbound webhook URL.

post.description: Send a test event to your tenant's webhook URL.

get.description: Current month usage vs plan limits.
List all API keys for the current tenant (hashes hidden).

post.description: Create a new API key. The plaintext key is returned ONCE.

get.description: Pipeline performance overview for the current tenant.
Daily listing creation counts for the past N days.

post.description: Approve multiple listings that are in IN_REVIEW state.
Get export download URLs for multiple listings.

get.description: Get the current tenant's brand kit, or null if not configured.

schema.title: Response Get Brand Kit Brand Kit Get

put.description: Create or update the tenant's brand kit.

post.description: Get a presigned S3 URL for uploading a brand logo.
Get a presigned S3 URL for uploading an agent headshot.
Get a presigned S3 URL for uploading a personal/team logo.

schema.title: Response Get Credit Transactions Credits Transactions Get

get.description: Return all active add-ons available for purchase.

post.description:
Activate an add-on for a listing, deducting the required credits.

Can only be applied before the pipeline starts (states: NEW, UPLOADING,
AWAITING_REVIEW, IN_REVIEW). Returns 402 if credits are insufficient.

get.description: List all add-ons activated for a specific listing.

schema.title: Response List Listing Addons Addons Listings  Listing Id  Addons Get

delete.description: Remove an add-on and refund credits if pipeline hasn't started.

get.description: Current user's profile and role within the tenant.
List all users in the current tenant. Requires admin+.

schema.title: Response List Members Team Members Get

post.description: Invite (create) a new team member in the current tenant. Requires admin+.

patch.description: Change a team member's role. Requires admin+.

delete.description: Remove a team member. Requires admin+. Cannot remove yourself.

post.description: Grant blanket access to all listings within the tenant for a user.

get.description: List blanket listing access grants for a specific user.

schema.title: Response List Blanket Grants Team Members  User Id  Listing Access Get

delete.description: Revoke a blanket listing access grant (soft-delete).

get.description: SSE stream of pipeline events for a listing.
Basic health check — tests DB connectivity.
Deep health check — verifies DB, Redis, and Temporal connectivity.

tags.name: listings
tags.description: Property listing CRUD, pipeline control, export

tags.name: credits
tags.description: Credit balance, transactions, and bundle purchases

tags.name: addons
tags.description: Premium add-on catalog and per-listing activation

tags.name: sse
tags.description: Server-Sent Events for real-time pipeline updates

tags.name: team
tags.description: Team member management within a tenant
